hero.name: Azzam Abdul Khadar
hero.subtitle: Full-stack and Flutter Developer
hero.description: I engineer scalable web and mobile applications using MERN stack and Flutter, delivering high-performance solutions with clean architecture and seamless user experience.
hero.performanceNote: ⚡ Improved application performance by 30% through optimization techniques

about.label: About Me
about.heading: Turning ideas into real products
about.para1: I'm a Full Stack and Flutter Developer from Hyderabad, India, with a B.Tech in Computer Science from VTU. Experienced in delivering production-ready applications with clean architecture, efficient state management, and measurable improvements in speed and usability.
about.para2_suffix: , I build Flutter-based user interfaces for Employee Management and Master Admin applications, crafting responsive, role-based UI components and integrating REST APIs with a MySQL backend.
about.para3_suffix: , I engineered 2+ full-stack web applications using the MERN stack, building platforms like TaskHive with 15+ REST APIs and optimizing backend performance by 30%.

highlights.frontendDesc: React.js, Next.js, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, Ant Design

ems.title: Employee Management System (EMS)
ems.shortDescription: A comprehensive Flutter-based system for managing employee tasks, attendance, and profiles with REST API integration and optimized performance.
ems.description: A comprehensive Flutter-based Employee Management System designed to streamline employee tasks, attendance tracking, and profile management. Built with reusable UI components and integrated with a MySQL backend through REST APIs using Dio, following clean architecture principles for maintainability.
highlights: Structured highly reusable UI components for improved scalability and maintainability
Integrated RESTful APIs with MySQL backend using Dio for efficient data handling
Enhanced app performance by reducing unnecessary widget rebuilds
Optimized rendering techniques resulting in smoother and more responsive user experience
Implemented clean architecture principles for better code organization
coreFeatures: Employee profile management and task assignment
Attendance tracking with daily and monthly reports
Role-based dashboards for admins and employees
Provider-based state management for efficient UI updates

taskhive.title: TaskHive
taskhive.shortDescription: A scalable MERN-based task management platform with lead tracking, scheduling, and secure API-driven workflows.
taskhive.description: A scalable MERN-based task management platform built to help teams and individuals organize tasks, track progress, manage leads, and streamline day-to-day collaboration through secure APIs and responsive workflows.
highlights: Improved API response time by 30% through database query optimization
Built secure RESTful APIs with authenticated file upload and document handling
Developed a responsive Ant Design interface for fast and intuitive task workflows
Optimized MongoDB/Mongoose operations for scalability and consistent performance
Implemented complete CRUD workflows for task management, lead tracking, and scheduling
coreFeatures: Task creation, assignment, and real-time status tracking
Secure file attachment and document management
Advanced filtering, sorting, and search functionality
User authentication with role-based access control
Responsive dashboard for activity overview and task monitoring

bloodhub.title: BloodHub
bloodhub.shortDescription: A scalable MERN blood donation platform automating donor-recipient matching and emergency request management.
bloodhub.description: A scalable MERN-based blood donation platform that automates donor-recipient matching, manages emergency blood requests, and streamlines coordination through secure, role-based workflows for donors, recipients, and administrators.
highlights: Reduced donor-recipient coordination time by ~30% via automated blood group-based matching
Built and optimized backend to reliably handle 100+ concurrent request workflows
Implemented JWT-based authentication with role-based access control (Donor/Recipient/Admin)
Developed real-time request tracking from creation to fulfillment
Designed secure RESTful APIs for registration, requests, updates, and status management
coreFeatures: Donor registration, profile management & availability tracking
Intelligent blood group + availability matching engine
Emergency request creation with live status updates
Admin dashboard for monitoring users and requests
Real-time request lifecycle tracking from creation to fulfillment

responsibilities: Built Flutter-based user interfaces for Employee Management System (EMS) and Master Admin applications.
Crafted responsive, role-based UI components for dashboards, attendance tracking, and employee workflows.
Integrated REST APIs using HTTP/Dio with a MySQL backend.
Implemented Provider-based state management for efficient UI updates.
Optimized rendering performance, improving UI responsiveness by 20–30%.
Collaborated in Agile teams for feature delivery, debugging, and iterative improvements.
Engineered 2+ full-stack web applications using the MERN stack.
Built and deployed TaskHive, a task management platform with 15+ REST APIs and real-time data handling.
Optimized backend performance using Mongoose, reducing response time by 30%.
Implemented secure file upload functionality using Multer and configured CORS for cross-origin access.
Developed responsive front-end interfaces using React.js, Vite, Bootstrap, and Ant Design.
Contributed to Agile workflows including sprint planning, code reviews, and debugging.
